card.name: White Knight
card.text: Stir: +5 ability for each stirring ally. Attack: Fall Dormant.

card.name: Polar Bear
card.text: Enters: Fall Dormant. Stir: +5 ability. Attack: Fall Dormant.

card.name: White Deer
card.text: Stir: +5 protect. Attack: Fall Dormant.

card.name: White Owl
card.text: Enters: Fall Dormant. Stir: +1 Bypass. Attack: Fall Dormant.

card.name: White Hare
card.text: Stir: +5 ability. Attack: Fall Dormant.

card.name: White Stoat
card.text: Enters: If an ally Stirred this turn +5 ability. Attack: Fall Dormant.

card.name: Harpist
card.text: Beginning of Turn: This card may fall dormant. Fall Dormant: Target falls dormant.

card.name: White Fox
card.text: End of Turn: If an ally fell dormant, draw a card.

card.name: White Mage
card.text: Enters: Deal 5 damage to opponent for each dormant creature.

card.name: Black Knight
card.text: Champion: +5 ability for each supporting ally. Support: +5 protect.

card.name: Black Bear
card.text: Champion: +5 ability. Support: Grant +5 attack.

card.name: Black Squire
card.text: Champion: +5 attack. Support: Grant +5 attack.

card.name: Wraith the Black Raven
card.text: Champion: +1 Bypass. Support: Grant +1 Bypass.

card.name: Black Turtle
card.text: Champion: +5 durability and protection. Support: Grant +5 durability.

card.name: Black Frog
card.text: Support: +1 Bypass.

card.name: Black Lizard
card.text: Champion: If this card dies this turn, return it to your hand.

card.name: Black Fox
card.text: Support: Draw 1 card.

card.name: Black Mage
card.text: Enters: Deal 5 damage to opponent for each enemy that supported this turn.

card.name: Faelin, Ooron's Pink Knight
card.text: Attack:+5 ability for each time you have peeked this turn.

card.name: Tasin, Elder Unicorn
card.text: Dies: place at top or bottom of deck if you have peeked this turn.

card.name: Lonely Unicorn
card.text: Anytime Once: Peek, if it is Pink, draw the card.

card.name: Young Unicorn
card.text: Anytime Once: Peek, if it is Pink, +5 Attack. If it is not Pink, Shuffle and Peak again.

card.name: Pink Sprite
card.text: Attack: Peak, +1 Bypass if the card is Pink.

card.name: Pink Snake
card.text: Protect or Attack: Place on top or bottom of deck after damage.

card.name: Pink Magpie
card.text: Attack: +1 bypass if you have peeked this turn.

card.name: Pink Fox
card.text: End of turn: If the top and bottom cards of your deck are Pink, draw them both.

card.name: Elreth the First Unicorn Mage
card.text: Enters: Deals 5 damage for each time you have peaked this turn.

card.name: Green Knight
card.text: Attack: +5 ability for each time you have fertilized this turn.

card.name: Green Elk
card.text: Attack: +5 ability if you have fertilized this turn. Kills: Fertilize.

card.name: Green Squire
card.text: Once Anytime: Fertilize. Fertilized: Grant +5 Ability.

card.name: Green Snake
card.text: Attacks First: Fertilize. Fertilized: Deal 5 damage.

card.name: Green Lizard
card.text: Attack: Fertilize. Fertilized: Place in hand.

card.name: Green Egg
card.text: Dies: Killer gains 10 life, fertilize. Start of Turn: Place in discard pile, fertilize. Fertilized: Play Green card with cost 3 or less.

card.name: Green Falcon
card.text: Attack: +1 bypass if you have fertilized this turn.

card.name: Green Fox
card.text: End of Turn: Draw 1 card if you have fertilized this turn. Fertilized: Draw 1 card.

card.name: Green Mage
card.text: Enters: Deal 5 damage for each time that you have fertilized this turn.

card.name: Red Knight
card.text: Attack: +5 Ability for each time you have attacked this turn.

card.name: Red Bull
card.text: Attack: +5 ability. No Attack: Destroy an ally. Dies: Destroy an ally.

card.name: Red Squire
card.text: Attack: Grant +5 Protection.

card.name: Cheech, the Vile Red Hound
card.text: Attack: +5 Protection.

card.name: Red Weasel
card.text: Attack: Lose 1 Life. If you already attacked, gain 2 life and +5 attack.

card.name: Red Squirrel
card.text: Attack: Gain 5 life.

card.name: Red Hawk
card.text: Attack: +1 Bypass if you have already attacked this turn.

card.name: Red Fox
card.text: End of Turn: Draw 1 card if you attacked more than once this turn.

card.name: Red Mage
card.text: Enters: Deal 5 damage for each time you have attacked this turn.

card.name: Orange Knight
card.text: Attack: +5 Ability for each time you have mode switched this turn.

card.name: Orange Bruiser
card.text: Protect: mode switch. Protection Mode: +5 Protection. Bruise Mode: +5 Attack.

card.name: Mythical Beast Poacher
card.text: Kill: mode switch. Huntsman Mode: +10 ability against pink. Trapper Mode: When a pink card that costs 2 or less enters, kill it.

card.name: Sleep Slaughterer
card.text: Attack: Mode Switch. Dream Thief Mode: +1 Attack for each dormant card. Slaughter Mode: Destroy the lowest cost dormant card.

card.name: Weakness Spotter
card.text: If 1 or less enemies attack: mode switch. Default Mode: +5 Attack. Protection Mode: +5 Protection

card.name: Ooze Specialist
card.text: Ooze Enters or dies: mode switch. Log Mode: +5 Ability. Collect Mode: Return Ooze in discard to hand.

card.name: Scrud the Sneak Thief
card.text: Kill: mode switch. Burglar Mode: +1 Bypass. Sneak Thief Mode: +2 Bypass if attacking the opponent.

card.name: Mecha Fox
card.text: End of Turn: Draw 1 card if an ally has mode switched this turn.

card.name: Morpho the Orange Mage
card.text: Enters: Deal 5 Damage for each time you have mode switched.

card.name: Sir Jüln the Blue Knight
card.text: Attack: +5 Ability for each time an ally has waited this turn.

card.name: Blue Lion
card.text: Wait: +10 Protect.

card.name: Blue Squire
card.text: Wait: +5 Protect.

card.name: Blue Eagle
card.text: Attack: +1 Bypass if an ally has waited this turn.

card.name: Blue Turtle
card.text: Wait: +5 Durability, +5 Protect.

card.name: Blue Squirrel
card.text: Wait: Gain 5 Life.

card.name: The Faceless Guru
card.text: Wait: Target card can wait twice this turn.

card.name: Blue Fox
card.text: End of Turn: If you have waited this turn, draw 1 card.

card.name: Blue Mage
card.text: Enters: Deal 5 Damage for each time you have waited this turn.

card.name: Purple Knight
card.text: Attack: +5 ability for each time you have dealt non-attack damage this turn.

card.name: Moon Bear
card.text: Attack: +5 ability if you have dealt non-attack damage this turn.

card.name: Purple Squire
card.text: Attack or Protect: Deal 5 damage.

card.name: Purple Falcon
card.text: Attack: +1 bypass if you have deealt non attack damage this turn.

card.name: Purple Spider
card.text: Any Card Enters: Deal 5 Damage to it.

card.name: Purple Hare
card.text: Attack: Deal 5 damage to target.

card.name: Purple Hound
card.text: Attack: Deal 5 Damage to target and +5 Protection.

card.name: Purple Fox
card.text: End of Turn: If you have dealt non-attack damage this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Baartlantean Purple Mage
card.text: Enters: Deal 5 damage for each time you have dealt non-attack damage this turn.

card.name: Tiberius the Toy Knight
card.text: Attack: +5 ability for each toy you control.

card.name: Toy Bear
card.text: Control Toy Parrot: +1 Bypass. Control Toy Fox: +5 Attack. Control Toy Mage: +5 ability when a toy enters.

card.name: Toy Squire
card.text: Attacked: +5 Durability for each toy you control.

card.name: Toy Parrot
card.text: Attack: +1 bypass if you control another toy.

card.name: Toy Soldier
card.text: Control Toy Swordsman: + 10 Protect. Toy Entered This Turn: +5 Ability.

card.name: Toy Swordsman
card.text: Toy Dies: +5 Ability. Control Toy Soldier: +10 Ability.

card.name: Toy Chest
card.text: End of Turn: Shuffle all toys in discard pile into deck.

card.name: Toy Fox
card.text: End of Turn: Draw 1 card if you control another toy.

card.name: Toy Mage
card.text: Enters: Deal 5 damage for each toy you control.

card.name: White Ooze
card.text: Dies: Target falls dormant. The next time it would stir, it doesn’t.

card.name: Black Ooze
card.text: Dies: Grant target ally +5 durability.

card.name: Red Ooze
card.text: Dies: Grant target ally +5 attack.

card.name: Blue Ooze
card.text: Dies: Grant target ally +5 protection.

card.name: Pink Ooze
card.text: Dies: You may swap the top and bottom cards of your deck.

card.name: Green Ooze
card.text: Dies: Fertilize. Fertilized: Grant target ally +3 ability.

card.name: Orange Ooze
card.text: Dies: Target card mode switches.

card.name: Purple Ooze
card.text: Dies: Deal 5 Damge.

card.name: Toy Ooze
card.text: Dies: Return to your choice of hand, top of deck, or bottom of deck if you control a toy.

card.name: Roc
card.text: Attack: +5 Bypass.

card.name: Phoenix
card.text: Dies: Add to hand, play this card for free. Attack: +1 Bypass.

card.name: Simple Sage
card.text: Attack: +5 ability for each ally with no text.

card.name: Guildmaster
card.text: Attack: Grant each knight and squire +5 ability.

card.name: Elder Fox
card.text: End of Turn: Draw 1 card for each fox you control.

card.name: Elder Mage
card.text: Enters: Deal 5 Damage for each mage you control. End of Turn: Copy target mage’s ability.

card.name: Death Mage
card.text: Attack: +5 ability for each card in your discard pile.

card.name: Pacifist Monk
card.text: End of Turn: If you have not attacked this turn, gain 10 life and draw a card.

card.name: Witch Doctor
card.text: Lost Life: Gain 5 Life. End of Turn: If you gained life this turn, gain 5 life.

card.name: White Ring
card.text: White Allies you control get +5 ability.

card.name: Black Ring
card.text: Black Allies you control get +5 ability.

card.name: Red Ring
card.text: Red Allies you control get +5 ability.

card.name: Pink Ring
card.text: Pink Allies you control get +5 ability.

card.name: Green Ring
card.text: Green Allies you control get +5 ability.

card.name: Blue Ring
card.text: Blue Allies you control get +5 ability.

card.name: Orange Ring
card.text: Orange Allies you control get +5 ability.

card.name: Purple Ring
card.text: Purple Allies you control get +5 ability.

card.name: Toy Ring
card.text: Toy Allies you control get +5 ability.

card.name: Knight Ring
card.text: Knights you control gain +5 ability.

card.name: Fox Ring
card.text: End of Turn: Draw 1 card if you control a fox.

card.name: Squire Ring
card.text: Squires you control gain +5 ability.

card.name: Ring of Flight
card.text: The first time you attack, grant +1 bypass.

card.name: Protective Ring
card.text: Allies you control gain +5 Protect.

card.name: Attack Ring
card.text: Allies you control gain +5 Attack.

card.name: Durable Ring
card.text: Allies you control gain +5 Durability.

card.name: Vanilla Ring
card.text: Allies with no text gain +5 ability.

card.name: Life Ring
card.text: Each time you gain life, gain 5 additional life.

card.name: Dormant Ring
card.text: Once Per Turn: Awaken target dormant card.

card.name: Champion's Ring
card.text: Creatures that champion get +5 ability.

card.name: Peaking Ring
card.text: After you peak, you may place the top card of your deck on the bottom of your deck.

card.name: Fertilizing Ring
card.text: The first time you fertilize each turn, you may duplicate the effect.

card.name: Waiting Ring
card.text: Allies that wait gain +5 Protect.

card.name: Damaging Ring
card.text: Whenever you deal non-attack damage, deal 1 extra.

card.name: Mode Ring
card.text: Anytime once: Target card mode switchs.

card.name: Attacking Ring
card.text: First Attack: Grant a different ally +5 attack.

card.name: Small Ring
card.text: One cost allies gain +5 ability.

card.name: Lullaby Ring
card.text: Enters: Target card becomes dormant. End of Turn: If this is not the first turn you controlled this ring, and an ally became dormant, target card becomes dormant.

card.name: Big Ring
card.text: V and VI cost allies cost one less.

card.name: Oozing Ring
card.text: Ooze Dies: Duplicate the ooze’s effect.

card.name: Ooze Killing Ring
card.text: End of Turn: You may destroy target ooze.

card.name: Mage Ring
card.text: Mages entering deals 5 additional damage

card.name: Late Ring
card.text: This ring gives 2 resource if you have 10 or more rings.

card.name: Ring of True Colors
card.text: When this ring enters choose a color. The first ally entering with that color each turn may attack the first turn they are played.

card.name: No Draw Ring
card.text: You may choose not to draw a card at the beginning of your turn, if you do your opponent skips their next card draw.

card.name: Destructo-Ring
card.text: Discard this ring to Discard target ring.

card.name: Stir Spell
card.text: Target card stirs.

card.name: Dormant Spell
card.text: Target card becomes dormant.

card.name: Champion Spell
card.text: Target champion duplicates its champion trigger.

card.name: Support Spell
card.text: Target card can support again.

card.name: Peak Spell
card.text: Peak.

card.name: Fertilize Spell
card.text: Fertilize.

card.name: Attack Spell
card.text: Grant +5 attack, if the target is the first attacker this turn grant +10.

card.name: Wait Spell
card.text: Target card can wait again.

card.name: mode switch Spell
card.text: Target card mode switches.

card.name: Direct Damage Spell
card.text: Deal 5 damage. If you have already dealt non-attack damage this turn, deal 5 again.

card.name: Bypass Spell
card.text: Grant +1 Bypass.

card.name: Stop Bypass Spell
card.text: Grant -1 Bypass.

card.name: Stop Protect Spell
card.text: Target card can not be protected.

card.name: Swap Target Spell
card.text: Target attacker attacks target card your opponent controls instead.

card.name: Extra Durable Spell
card.text: Grant +5 Durability.

card.name: Return to Hand Spell
card.text: Return target card from the discard pile to hand.

card.name: Destroy Spell
card.text: Destroy target card.

card.name: Draw Spell
card.text: Draw 1 card.

card.name: Toy Monkey
card.text: Attack Opponenet: +1 Bypass Protected: Swap protector with an alternate card.

card.name: Wind Up Toy
card.text: Stir and Other Toy Controlled: +5 Ability, Attack: +5 Attack, Fall Dormant at end of Turn.

card.name: Toy Fighter Jet
card.text: Attack: +1 Bypass, End of Turn: Deal 5 damage if you control an other toy.

card.name: Toy Castle
card.text: Toys you control gain +5 Durability.

card.name: Green Fungus
card.text: Enters: Choose target ally and grant +5 ability as long as both cards are on the field. Fertilized: Instead of placing on the bottom of your deck, you may pay 2 and play this card on the field.

card.name: Green Witch
card.text: Whenever you fertilize, chose one: Grant +1 Bypass, Grant +5 Attack, Grant +5 Durability.

card.name: Green Tree Warrior
card.text: Green card enters: Fertilize, +5 Attack.

card.name: Green Monkey
card.text: Attack Opponenet: +1 Bypass. Protected: Fertilize.

card.name: Blue Sloth
card.text: Whenever you wait, gain 5 life.

card.name: Blue Gator
card.text: Wait: Protect: Deal half of Blue Gator's attack as damage to the attacking card, if Blue Gator waited last turn.

card.name: Blue Witch
card.text: Whenever you wait, chose one: Grant +1 Bypass, Grant +5 Protect, Grant +5 Durability.

card.name: Search Spell
card.text: Choose a color. Reveal cards from the top of your deck until you find a card of that color. Put that card in your hand. Shuffle the other cards and put them at the bottom of your library.

card.name: Blue Llama
card.text: Wait: Deal 5 damage.

card.name: Battlefield Medic
card.text: Support: gain 5 life and grant +5 durability.

card.name: Red Vulture
card.text: Attack: +5 Attack if an enemy has died this turn. Kills: +5 attack.

card.name: Red Mouse
card.text: Attack Last: Can't be bypassed.

card.name: Red Devil
card.text: Can attack twice.

card.name: Red Assasin
card.text: If you attacked 3 or more times this turn, destroy target card with cost 3 or less.

card.name: Black Sage
card.text: Support: Your champion duplicates the champion effect

card.name: Black Scorpion
card.text: Champion: Destroy the first protector declared. Support: Deestroy the first protector declared.

card.name: Black Bat
card.text: Champion: +1 Bypass Support: Choose a color, look at the top card of opponnets library, if it is that color, grant +5 attack.

card.name: White Witch
card.text: Whenever an ally fals dormant, chose one: Grant +1 Bypass, Grant +5 Protect, Gain 5 Life.

card.name: White Wolf
card.text: Ally falls dormant: +5 Protect.

card.name: White Bat
card.text: Enters: Falls dormant, Stir: Choose a color, look at the top card of opponnets library, if it is that color, grant +5 attack, Attack: +1 Bypass, Fall Dormant.

card.name: White Squirrel
card.text: Enters: Falls dormant. Stirs: Gain 5 life, +5 attack End of Turn: Falls dormant.

card.name: Pink Squire
card.text: Attack or Protect: Peak.

card.name: Reckless Unicorn
card.text: Enters: Destroy target ally and target enemy.

card.name: Unicorn Sentinel
card.text: Whenever you peak, gain +5 protect.

card.name: Pink Witch
card.text: Whenever you peak, choose one: place the top card of your deck into the discard pile, place the top card of your deck onto the bottom of your deck, gain 5 life.

card.name: Purple Monkey
card.text: Attack Opponent: +5 bypass, deal 5 damage.

card.name: Purple Skunk
card.text: First Enemy Enters: Deal 5 damage to it.

card.name: Purple Snake
card.text: Attacks First: Deal 5 Damage.

card.name: Purple Deer
card.text: When this takes non-attack damage for the first time each turn, gain 5 life.

card.name: Orange Protector
card.text: Mode 1: The first time you or an ally would take non-attack damage, negate it. Mode 2: +5 protect and attack if an enemy has championed this turn. Protects: Mode Switch.

card.name: Arsonist
card.text: Urban Mode: Brown cards take double damage from Arsonist. Environmental Mode: Green cards take double damage from Arsonist. Another card you control is destroyed: Mode Shift.

card.name: Orange Swrodsman
card.text: Mode 1: Target card must attack orange swordsman at the beginning of the next attack phase. Mode 2: +5 durability if a red card has attacked this turn. Kills: Mode Switch.

card.name: Orange Paladin
card.text: Inspiration Mode: 1 cost cards you control gain +10 durability. Avenger Mode: Allies you control gain +10 durability when attacked by cards with cost 5 or higher. On Protect: Mode Shift.

card.name: Top Deck Spell
card.text: Peak, you may put this card at the bottom of your library or in your discard pile.

card.name: Re-spell spell
card.text: Re-shuffle all charms in your discard pile into your deck.

card.name: Re-creation spell
card.text: Re-shuffle all creations in your discard pile into your deck.

card.name: Charming Ring
card.text: Whenever you play a charm gain 5 life.

card.name: Big Draw Spell
card.text: Draw 2 cards.

card.name: Hand Destruction Spell
card.text: Discard your hand.

card.name: Mutual Draw Spell
card.text: Draw 2 cards, your opponent draws 1 card.
